note: Reasoning tasks answered deterministically by the CodeGraph + KnowledgeIndex + ExperienceMemory over the real repo. No model required to pass; an optional local model only enriches explanations. Executed by LocalAIFactory.Reasoning.Tests/BenchmarkTests.cs which writes benchmarks/results/laf-software-reasoning-benchmark.json.

tasks.task: Find all code touching AppUser auth.
Find what breaks if StockLedgerEntry changes.
Find knowledge pack for manufacturing depth.
Find why the LocalDB migration failed earlier.
Find knowledge about external production blockers.
Build a reasoning context for an auth-hardening task.
Locate the ReportsService and its file.
Given a stock-test symptom, find relevant knowledge.

passCriteria: >= 80% of tasks answered with deterministic retrieval; model optional
